name: Brightline Logistics
wins: Positive feedback in latest NPS survey citing support responsiveness
Champion promoted internally and remains strong advocate
Integrated our platform into their core workflow (Salesforce sync live)

narrative.executive_summary: Brightline Logistics enters this QBR in strong standing. Health score has climbed 20 points over the last four quarters, and the account shows consistent engagement across usage and relationship signals.
narrative.recommendation: Use this QBR to explore expansion -- additional seats, modules, or a case study/reference ask, given the strength of the relationship.

name: Fernwood Health Group
wins: Adopted the reporting/analytics module after Q1 enablement session
risks: No executive sponsor engagement in over 150 days
Key integration has been broken/unused since last quarter

narrative.executive_summary: Fernwood Health Group requires immediate attention. Health score has dropped 39 points over the last four quarters, moving the account into the At Risk band. This QBR should focus on a recovery plan, not a standard business review.
narrative.recommendation: Address the top risk factor directly with the account before discussing renewal terms. Consider a mid-cycle check-in rather than waiting for the QBR. Renewal is in 45 days -- treat this as time-sensitive.
